paragraphs: I'm a Software Engineer with hands-on experience building scalable backend services and full-stack applications. Most recently at Fidelity Investments, I worked in Brokerage Technology — shipping a distributed logging library that cut debugging time by ~75%, an async analytics pipeline handling 40M+ requests, and data dashboards surfacing insights across business units.

Before that, I built production apps at Codiste, including a job platform launched with real users. I also build side projects like MemoAlgo, a spaced repetition platform I architected and deployed end-to-end.
I'm driven by clean API design, testable code, and building software that solves real problems.
